visual: Same bar graph from Warmup (Favorite Lunch: Pizza 45, Tacos 25, Salad 10, Burgers 15). Question displayed: "How many more students chose pizza than tacos and salad together?"
guide: "Remember this question from Warmup? You noticed it needed more than one step. Now let's figure out HOW to solve it."
guide_2: "First, let's find the categories we need. Which categories does the question ask about? Select all of the needed categories."
on_correct: "Those three. Notice we DON'T need burgers—the question doesn't ask about burgers."
on_incorrect: (includes Burgers) "Read the question again. Does it mention burgers?"
on_incorrect_2: (missing one) "The question mentions pizza, tacos, AND salad. Select all three."
